news.t: GraniteShares 2x Long IONQ Daily ETF (IONL), GraniteShares 2x Long VRT Daily ETF (VRTL), and GraniteShares 2x Long RDDT Daily ETF (RDTL) Launch Today.

overview.description: The GraniteShares 2x Long IONQ Daily ETF (IONL) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in information technology equity. The fund provides 2x leveraged exposure, less fees and expenses, to the daily price movement for shares of IonQ, Inc. (IONQ) stock. IONL was launched on Mar 25, 2025 and is issued by GraniteShares.

data.title: GraniteShares 2x Long IONQ Daily ETF (IONL), GraniteShares 2x Long VRT Daily ETF (VRTL), and GraniteShares 2x Long RDDT Daily ETF (RDTL) Launch Today.
data.text: NEW YORK, March 25, 2025 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- GraniteShares, a leading provider of high-conviction exchange-traded funds (ETFs), today announced the launch of three new leveraged single-stock ETFs: Gra...
